label: Elevated resting muscle tension in shoulders and jaw
measurement_item_or_signal: Self-rated shoulder and jaw tension right now

label: Low moment-to-moment awareness of bodily tension
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how much have you noticed bodily tension or tightness before it led to another symptom?

label: Headaches triggered by muscular tension
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, have you experienced a headache and its intensity?
measurement_scale_or_unit: Two parts: (A) Headache flag (yes/no) optional; (B) Intensity 1-9 Likert (1=none, 9=very severe). Use intensity as node.

label: Persistent anticipatory threat expectation
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now, how much do you expect that something bad is about to happen?

label: Difficulty relaxing on low-stress days
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how difficult has it been to relax given the current context?

label: Habitual anticipatory muscle bracing in absence of immediate threat
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, to what extent did you find yourself automatically bracing/tensing (posture/face)?

label: Progressive muscle relaxation (PMR) practice intensity since last prompt
measurement_item_or_signal: How much PMR practice (short guided or self) did you do since last prompt?

label: Interoceptive awareness/body-scan practice (mindfulness) since last prompt
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how much did you practice body-focused interoception (body-scan/notice tension)?

label: Diaphragmatic/soothing breathing micro-practices since last prompt
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how much breathing practice did you do?

label: Sleep quality last night (morning diary)
measurement_item_or_signal: Last-night sleep quality

label: Ergonomic/posture adjustments and mindful posture checks since last prompt
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how much did you do posture/ergonomic adjustments or posture checks?

label: Passive jaw-clench/bruxism sensor event count (per EMA window)
measurement_item_or_signal: Jaw clench/bruxism event count in last EMA window

label: Hourly micro-breaks with movement since last prompt
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how many micro-breaks with movement did you take?

label: Threat reappraisal / cognitive reframing practice since last prompt
measurement_item_or_signal: Since last prompt, how much did you use cognitive reappraisal/ threat reappraisal strategies?

label: Nightmare-triggered awakenings (occurrence)
measurement_item_or_signal: Last-night: Did you awaken due to a nightmare? (0=no, 1=yes) If yes: number_of_awakenings_last_night (integer) and primary_awakening_time (timestamp).

label: Nightmare vividness/intensity
measurement_item_or_signal: If awakened by nightmare: How vivid/real did the dream feel? (1=not vivid at all to 9=extremely vivid)

label: Anticipatory fear of sleep / reluctance to go to bed
measurement_item_or_signal: Right now (pre-bed): How afraid or worried are you about going to sleep because of nightmares? (1=not at all to 9=extremely)

label: Acute autonomic arousal on awakening
measurement_item_or_signal: Morning report: On awakening from the nightmare, did you feel sweating/heart racing? Rate peak arousal 1-9. Passive: timestamped nocturnal HR spike (beats per minute) and HRV nadir (RMSSD ms) during flagged awakening.

label: Prolonged post-awakening physiological/psychological activation
measurement_item_or_signal: How long did it take you to feel calm/settled after the awakening? (minutes) and subjective difficulty calming (1=very quick/easy to 9=very prolonged/difficult)

label: Difficulty resuming sleep after nightmare awakenings
measurement_item_or_signal: After the awakening, how difficult was it for you to fall back asleep? (1=not difficult to 9=extremely difficult) and estimated minutes to fall back asleep.

label: Imagery Rehearsal Therapy (IRT) practice adherence
measurement_item_or_signal: Did you practice IRT last night or today? (1-9 adherence/intensity scale; 0=no practice event)

label: Presleep wind-down / detachment routine adherence
measurement_item_or_signal: Did you follow your wind-down routine? Rate adherence 1-9.

label: Paced breathing / grounding practice (post-awakening)
measurement_item_or_signal: If awakened: Did you use paced breathing/grounding? Rate effectiveness 1-9 and duration minutes.

label: Sleep environment quality (comfort, light, temperature, noise)
measurement_item_or_signal: Rate overall sleep environment quality last night (1=very poor to 9=excellent). Indicate notable disturbances (noise/light).

label: Nightly wearable HR/HRV arousal index (passive)
measurement_item_or_signal: Nightly mean nocturnal HR, nocturnal RMSSD (ms), count of HR spikes above threshold within night-awakening windows; aggregated 00:00-08:00

label: Nonengagement with clock-checking (nighttime checking behavior)
measurement_item_or_signal: Did you check the time/clock during the night or after awakening? (count or yes/no + impact rating 1-9)

label: Mindfulness/acceptance practice (in-bed or pre-sleep)
measurement_item_or_signal: Did you use a mindfulness/acceptance practice pre-bed or after awakening? Rate helpfulness 1-9.

label: Bedtime/return-to-bed settling routine adherence (settling routine)
measurement_item_or_signal: If awakened: Did you use your return-to-bed settling routine? Rate adherence/effectiveness 1-9.

label: Diminished positive emotional response to pleasant events
measurement_item_or_signal: When something good happened since the last prompt, how much did you actually feel pleasure? (1=None — 9=A lot)

label: Guilt about not enjoying positive experiences
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you feel guilty because you didn’t enjoy something you thought you should? Rate intensity. (1=None — 9=Very strong)

label: Behavioral autopilot / low moment-to-moment engagement
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how often did you feel 'on autopilot' or not mentally present? (1=Not at all — 9=Almost always)

label: General emotional blunting (low affect intensity)
measurement_item_or_signal: Overall, since the last prompt, how intense were your emotions when something happened? (1=Very muted — 9=Very intense)

label: External presentation of being 'fine' despite internal disengagement
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how much did you present as 'fine' outwardly while feeling different inside? (1=Not at all — 9=Very much)

label: Reduced motivation/interest to pursue non-routine pleasurable activities
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how motivated were you to start or plan an enjoyable non-routine activity? (1=None — 9=Very motivated)

label: Behavioral activation: planned pleasant/activity adherence
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you do a planned pleasant activity or take a step toward one? Rate adherence (1=No effort — 9=Fully carried out)

label: Positive-event noticing / savoring practice engagement
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you notice or savor any positive moment? Rate intensity (1=None — 9=Strong savoring)

label: Self-compassion / guilt-reduction practice use
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you use a self-compassion exercise or notice kinder self-talk? (1=None — 9=Used thoroughly)

label: Micro-activation energizers (5-minute activations)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, did you perform a brief energizer (5 minutes)? Rate effort (1=None — 9=Fully done)

label: Brief mindful present-moment check-ins (attention)
measurement_item_or_signal: Since the last prompt, how present/attentive did you feel? (1=Not at all — 9=Very present)

label: Social connectedness: brief interactions / outreach
measurement_item_or_signal: Today, how many meaningful social interactions did you have? (0,1-2,3+); and rate their quality 1-9
measurement_scale_or_unit: count + 1-9 quality rating (use quality as primary node)

label: Sleep quality and regularity (previous night)
measurement_item_or_signal: How well did you sleep last night? (1=Very poorly — 9=Very well). Also capture sleep duration (hours).

label: Morning light exposure / early activity (minutes bright)
measurement_item_or_signal: Minutes above threshold lux between 06:00-10:00 (daily aggregate)
